CustomField.description: For use with Lottery Reporting TASK0198615. University Credit amount given by this donor for (Football Season year minus 3). The year of giving for this amount is in field "Year of Current Calendar Year Credit -9"
CustomField.inlineHelpText: University Credit amount given by this donor for (Football Season year minus 3). The year of giving for this amount is in field "Year of Current Calendar Year Credit -9"
CustomField.label: Current Calendar Year Credit -9
